title: Fluorescence lifetime imaging ophthalmoscopy.
author: Dysli C Wolf S Berezin MY Sauer L Hammer M Zinkernagel MS
content: S-EPMC7396320 PMC7396320 Fluorescence lifetime imaging ophthalmoscopy. Imaging techniques based on retinal autofluorescence have found broad applications in ophthalmology because they are extremely sensitive and noninvasive. Conventional fundus autofluorescence imaging measures fluorescence
